title: Expose vault write APIs for task lifecycle
completion_summary: Added vault-backed task lifecycle API routes for patch, claim, heartbeat, request-approval, approve, and reject using a shared task lifecycle service and verified them with focused tests.
acceptance_criteria: PATCH /api/vault/tasks/[id] updates task status, column, and progress
POST /api/vault/tasks/[id]/claim, /heartbeat, /request-approval, /approve, and /reject are wired to existing write services
Validation still rejects malformed or secret-bearing writes
